iti20:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti20:2.1:
“Monks, there is the case where a certain person is corrupt-minded.
Having encompassed that mind with [my] awareness, I discern,
iti20:2.2: ‘If this person were to die at this instant, then as if he were to be carried off, he would thus be placed in hell.’
iti20:2.5:
It’s because of corrupt-mindedness that there are cases where beings–at the break-up of the body,
after death–reappear in a plane of deprivation, a bad destination, a lower realm, hell.”
iti20:3.3: the One Awakened explained its meaning
iti20:3.4: in the presence of the monks.
iti20:4.2: were to die at this instant,
iti20:5.1: as if he were carried off
iti20:5.4: that beings go to a bad destination.
